summary: shortlinks is a small internal URL shortener service: a FastAPI HTTP API for creating and resolving short link codes, backed by an in-memory store (a Redis adapter is mentioned as planned but does not exist yet). Python project managed with uv/pyproject.toml; tests run with pytest.

entrypoints.description: FastAPI application object; served via `uv run uvicorn shortlinks.main:app`

key_directories.role: application source: API routes (main.py) and the in-memory link store (store.py)
